name: Striped Beach Towel Green/White - Sun Squad™
description:
Add a splash of color to your beachside fun with this Striped Printed Beach Towel from Sun Squad™. Made of 100% velour cotton, this lightweight beach towel has a rectangular shape and is perfect for sunbathing on the beach or drying off at the pool. Plus, the striped pattern— green and white stripes at the core and red and aqua blue stripes at the bordered ends—gives off a fun, summery vibe that will stand out on your upcoming beach trip or vacation.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
